_**User (2026-04-06 18:53:41Z)**_

<command-message>loop</command-message>
<command-name>/loop</command-name>

_**User (2026-04-06 18:53:41Z)**_

Usage: /loop [interval] <prompt>

Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval.

Intervals: Ns, Nm, Nh, Nd (e.g. 5m, 30m, 2h, 1d). Minimum granularity is 1 minute.
If no interval is specified, defaults to 10m.

Examples:
  /loop 5m /babysit-prs
  /loop 30m check the deploy
  /loop 1h /standup 1
  /loop check the deploy          (defaults to 10m)
  /loop check the deploy every 20m

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-06 18:53:45Z)**_



It looks like you need to provide a prompt or command for `/loop` to run. For example:

```
/loop 5m /board:check
/loop 30m check the deploy
/loop 10m npm run build
```

What would you like to run on a loop, and at what interval?

<command-message>board:init</command-message>
<command-name>/board:init</command-name>

_**User (2026-04-06 18:55:38Z)**_

# Initialize Board System

Scaffold the board project management system into the current project.

## Steps

### 1. Check for Existing Board

Check if a `board/` directory already exists in the project root.

- If it exists, inform the user and ask if they want to re-initialize (which would overwrite spec files but preserve existing board items)
- If it doesn't exist, proceed with full initialization

### 2. Run Init Script

Run the initialization script to create directories, copy specs, and set up ID tracking:

```bash
bash /Users/grant/Documents/Projects/BoardPM/plugin/scripts/board-init.sh /Users/grant/Documents/Projects/BoardPM/plugin
```

This creates in one shot:
- `board/{tasks,planning,reference,resources,archive}/`
- `board/.doc-ids` (ID tracking file)

The script is idempotent — it skips files/directories that already exist.

### 3. Update CLAUDE.md

Read `/Users/grant/Documents/Projects/BoardPM/plugin/templates/claude-md-snippet.md` for the snippet content.

- If a `CLAUDE.md` exists in the project root, check if it already contains a "Project Board" section
  - If yes, inform the user it's already configured
  - If no, append the snippet to the end of the file
- If no `CLAUDE.md` exists, ask the user if they want one created with the board snippet

### 4. Summary

Display what was created:

```
Board system initialized:
  board/tasks/          — actionable work items
  board/planning/       — epics, ADRs, notes
  board/reference/      — evergreen knowledge
  board/resources/      — external material inbox
  board/archive/        — completed items
  board/.doc-ids        — ID tracking file

Available commands:
  /board:board-show           — view board overview
  /board:board-add            — create new items
  /board:board-edit           — modify existing items
  /board:board-check          — find related board context
  /board:board-update         — reconcile board with codebase
  /board:board-archive        — archive completed items
```

```text
---
type: note
status: inbox
created: 2026-04-01
---

# Sync chart step dots with swatch count

When the swatch count is reduced (e.g. 5), the curve charts still show dots for every lightness step. Add an option to toggle between showing steps for all lightness values or just the colors in the palette. When showing all values, visually distinguish swatch-aligned dots from the rest (e.g. larger/brighter dots for swatch steps, dimmed or hidden for others).
[result-id: r5]
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-06 19:16:24Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./board/archive/NOTE-0028_favicon-spec-compliance.md`

```text
1	---
2	type: note
3	status: processed
4	created: 2026-03-31
5	---
6	
7	# NOTE-0028: Favicon & Web Icon Spec Compliance
8	
9	Comprehensive reference for all favicon/icon assets needed for modern best practices. Research conducted 2026-03-31.
10	
11	## Current State
12	
13	- SVG favicon exists (`app/public/favicon.svg`) — color picker gradient with parabolic "C" curve
14	- Dynamic favicon hook (`useDynamicFavicon`) updates SVG hue in real-time
15	- Link tag in `index.html` for SVG only
16	
17	## Files Needed
18	
19	| File | Size | Format | Purpose | Status |
20	|---|---|---|---|---|
21	| `favicon.ico` | 32x32 (or 16+32 multi) | ICO | Legacy browsers, RSS readers, crawlers | Missing |
22	| `favicon.svg` | Vector | SVG | Modern browsers | Done |
23	| `favicon-48x48.png` | 48x48 | PNG | Google Search results (minimum 48px required) | Missing |
24	| `apple-touch-icon.png` | 180x180 | PNG (opaque) | iOS home screen, Siri, Spotlight | Missing |
25	| `icon-192.png` | 192x192 | PNG | Android home screen, PWA install | Missing |
26	| `icon-512.png` | 512x512 | PNG | PWA splash screen, high-res displays | Missing |
27	| `icon-maskable-192.png` | 192x192 | PNG | Android adaptive icons (needs safe zone padding) | Missing |
28	| `icon-maskable-512.png` | 512x512 | PNG | Android adaptive icons (needs safe zone padding) | Missing |
29	| `manifest.webmanifest` | — | JSON | PWA manifest declaring icons + app metadata | Missing |
30	| `og-image.png` | 1200x630 | PNG | Social sharing (Facebook, Twitter, Slack, etc.) | Missing |
31	
32	## HTML Tags Required
33	
34	```html
35	<link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico" sizes="32x32">
36	<link rel="icon" href="/favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml">
37	<link rel="icon" href="/favicon-48x48.png" sizes="48x48" type="image/png">
38	<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png">
39	<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.webmanifest">
40	<meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0a0a">
41	```
42	
43	Note: `sizes="32x32"` on the ICO link fixes a Chrome bug where it prefers ICO over SVG.
44	
45	## Design Constraints
46	
47	- **Maskable icons**: Content must fit within a centered circle of 40% radius. Separate files from regular icons — never use `"purpose": "any maskable"`.
48	- **Apple touch icon**: Must be opaque (no transparency — iOS fills transparent areas with black). Add ~20px padding with solid background.
49	- **OG image**: Separate design task, 1200x630 social preview card. Keep important content within central 1080x566 safe zone.
50	- **Dynamic favicon**: The `useDynamicFavicon` hook overrides the SVG at runtime — static files serve as fallbacks for non-JS contexts.
51	
52	## Deprecated / Not Needed
53	
54	- Safari pinned tab (`mask-icon`) — obsolete since Safari 12
55	- Windows tiles / `browserconfig.xml` — legacy IE/Win8
56	- Multiple Apple touch icon sizes — single 180x180 sufficient
57	- `rel="shortcut icon"` — `shortcut` was never a valid relation
58	- Opera Coast (228x228) — browser discontinued 2017
59	
[result-id: r8]
```
</details></tool-use>

-type: note

-
-# NOTE-0024: Favicon & Web Icon Spec Compliance
-
-Comprehensive reference for all favicon/icon assets needed for modern best practices. Research conducted 2026-03-31.
-
-## Current State
-
-- SVG favicon exists (`app/public/favicon.svg`) — color picker gradient with parabolic "C" curve
-- Dynamic favicon hook (`useDynamicFavicon`) updates SVG hue in real-time
-- Link tag in `index.html` for SVG only
-
-## Files Needed
-
-| File | Size | Format | Purpose | Status |
-|---|---|---|---|---|
-| `favicon.ico` | 32x32 (or 16+32 multi) | ICO | Legacy browsers, RSS readers, crawlers | Missing |
-| `favicon.svg` | Vector | SVG | Modern browsers | Done |
-| `favicon-48x48.png` | 48x48 | PNG | Google Search results (minimum 48px required) | Missing |
-| `apple-touch-icon.png` | 180x180 | PNG (opaque) | iOS home screen, Siri, Spotlight | Missing |
-| `icon-192.png` | 192x192 | PNG | Android home screen, PWA install | Missing |
-| `icon-512.png` | 512x512 | PNG | PWA splash screen, high-res displays | Missing |
-| `icon-maskable-192.png` | 192x192 | PNG | Android adaptive icons (needs safe zone padding) | Missing |
-| `icon-maskable-512.png` | 512x512 | PNG | Android adaptive icons (needs safe zone padding) | Missing |
-| `manifest.webmanifest` | — | JSON | PWA manifest declaring icons + app metadata | Missing |
-| `og-image.png` | 1200x630 | PNG | Social sharing (Facebook, Twitter, Slack, etc.) | Missing |
-
-## HTML Tags Required
-
-```html
-<link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico" sizes="32x32">
-<link rel="icon" href="/favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml">
-<link rel="icon" href="/favicon-48x48.png" sizes="48x48" type="image/png">
-<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png">
-<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.webmanifest">
-<meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0a0a">
-```
-
-Note: `sizes="32x32"` on the ICO link fixes a Chrome bug where it prefers ICO over SVG.
-
-## Design Constraints
-
-- **Maskable icons**: Content must fit within a centered circle of 40% radius. Separate files from regular icons — never use `"purpose": "any maskable"`.
-- **Apple touch icon**: Must be opaque (no transparency — iOS fills transparent areas with black). Add ~20px padding with solid background.
-- **OG image**: Separate design task, 1200x630 social preview card. Keep important content within central 1080x566 safe zone.
-- **Dynamic favicon**: The `useDynamicFavicon` hook overrides the SVG at runtime — static files serve as fallbacks for non-JS contexts.
-
-## Deprecated / Not Needed
-
-- Safari pinned tab (`mask-icon`) — obsolete since Safari 12
-- Windows tiles / `browserconfig.xml` — legacy IE/Win8
-- Multiple Apple touch icon sizes — single 180x180 sufficient
-- `rel="shortcut icon"` — `shortcut` was never a valid relation
-- Opera Coast (228x228) — browser discontinued 2017
